name: logical_right_shift_large_constant
description: Code should include a logical right shift (>>) with a constant shift amount that exceeds 32 bits, triggering integer overflow in opt_expr optimization

name: arithmetic_right_shift_large_constant
description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift (>>>) with a constant shift amount that exceeds 32 bits, triggering integer overflow in opt_expr optimization
snippet:
wire signed w = 1'b1;
assign out = w >>> 36'hfffffffff;

name: bit_slice_with_large_shift
description: Code should include a bit-slice selection followed by a right shift with a constant shift amount that exceeds 32 bits, triggering integer overflow during optimization

name: signed_operand_arithmetic_shift_overflow
description: Code should include a signed signal with arithmetic right shift (>>>) using a large constant that overflows 32-bit int, causing incorrect optimization
snippet:
wire signed s = 1'b1;
assign out = s >>> 36'hfffffffff;

name: constant_shift_saturation_safety
description: Code should include a right shift with a constant shift amount at the 32-bit boundary (e.g., 0xffffffff), which saturates to INT_MAX and produces zero result
